name: beam — furniture configurator
description:
In high-end furniture, customization is essential to getting the result right. beam is a product configurator built for luxury furnishings — instantly visualize any product and material combination, from individual pieces to full compositions, for rapid iteration and informed decisions.

Explore current design directions with filters by brand or product type, and save favorite configurations to a collection for later reference.

name: Launch Real Estate
description: Launch Real Estate is home to the sharpest, most experienced, and preeminent Realtors® in Arizona real estate.

name: Hue Power
description:
Use your phone as a remote for your Philips Hue lights — toggle them on and off, fine-tune brightness, switch colors and save your favorites. Built on a custom SDK for communicating with the Hue bridge.

Great lights control
- Control Hue lights individually
- Turn lights on/off and set brightness from the main screen
- Use a master fader to fine-tune your active lights
- Power-on Behavior: decide how your lights come back on

Manage your lights as groups
- Group lights and control them with a single touch
- Set a whole group to the same color and brightness

Snapshots — capture a moment
- Save the state of all active lights into a snapshot and recall it later
- Use snapshots as scenes and share them via your Hue bridge

Multi-bridge support
- Use more than one Philips Hue bridge at the same time

name: PoGoChat
description: Real-time chat for Pokémon Go players, with a live map of Pokémon locations and user-made points of interest.

name: Mighthub
description: A B2C marketplace connecting advertisers with specially talented providers. I built the iOS app — prepay system, phone validation and real-time chat.

name: Project Hero
description: Contributed to an internal corporate app from mid-development to MVP, mostly building the UI in code and integrating Core Data.

name: Body Spa Salons & Wellness
description: A whitelabel booking app powered by our Tappointment platform.

name: Tappointment
description:
Your 24/7 receptionist. Couldn't reach your hairdresser, cosmetician or trainer over the phone because they were busy or on holiday? Instead of calling, use Tappointment to book an appointment anytime, anywhere — modifying or cancelling takes just a few taps.

Sync Tappointment with your other calendars and see all your appointments alongside your provider's free slots on one page. Browse providers and services to find the one that suits you best.

For providers: manage your business inside the app — publish your schedule, stay bookable 24/7, invite your customers, and let your calendar fill up automatically without making or taking phone calls.

name: e-Napló
description: An app for Hungarian parents to follow their children's schoolwork, ported from the existing Android version in my free time.

name: Calmarkr
description: The predecessor to Tappointment — basic appointment booking for users and simple calendar management for providers.
